summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the unified SLA & Escalation Policies module. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 3 tabs (Policies, Monitoring, Escalation History), policy creation dialog with scope selection (Roles, Teams, Specialties), SLA rules configuration, and escalation levels. Route redirects from /sla and /escalation to /sla-policies working correctly. Workflow action 'apply_sla_policy' confirmed to replace 'auto_escalate'.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sla-policies returns empty list initially
Backend: POST /api/sla-policies creates policy with scope, sla_rules, thresholds, escalation_levels
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/{id} returns correct structure with all fields
Backend: PUT /api/sla-policies/{id} updates policy correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/sla-policies/{id} soft deletes policy
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/stats returns order counts (total_active, on_track, at_risk, breached)
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/at-risk returns at-risk orders
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/breached returns breached orders
Backend: GET /api/sla-policies/monitoring/history returns escalation history
Backend: GET /api/roles returns roles for scope selection
Backend: GET /api/teams returns teams for scope selection
Backend: GET /api/specialties returns specialties for scope selection
Backend: Policy creation with role scope populates role_names
Backend: GET /api/workflows/meta/actions includes 'apply_sla_policy' action with policy_id config
Backend: POST /api/sla-policies/check triggers policy evaluation
Frontend: SLA & Escalation Policies page loads with 3 tabs
Frontend: Policies tab shows policy list with SLA duration and escalation levels
Frontend: Monitoring tab shows At Risk and Breached sections
Frontend: Escalation History tab shows history log
Frontend: New Policy dialog shows Policy Scope with Roles, Teams, Specialties checkboxes
Frontend: New Policy dialog shows SLA Clock Rules (duration, at-risk threshold, business hours)
Frontend: New Policy dialog shows Escalation Levels with Add Level button
Frontend: Policy creation saves and shows success toast
Frontend: /sla route redirects to /sla-policies
Frontend: /escalation route redirects to /sla-policies
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'SLA & Escalation' navigation item
critical_code_review_comments: sla_policies.py: Well-structured routes with proper CRUD operations and monitoring endpoints
sla_policy.py: Comprehensive Pydantic models for policy scope, SLA rules, thresholds, and escalation levels
sla_policy_engine.py: Robust policy engine with escalation level processing and action execution
SLAPolicies.js: Complete UI with 3 tabs, policy dialog with scope selection, and monitoring views
App.js: Proper route redirects from /sla and /escalation to /sla-policies
Layout.js: Sidebar correctly shows 'SLA & Escalation' navigation item
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed policies during backend testing. Created TEST_UI_Policy via frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified SLA & Escalation Policies module is fully functional. The module merges the old separate SLA and Escalation pages into one. Key features: (1) Policies tab for CRUD operations with scope (Roles/Teams/Specialties), SLA rules, thresholds, and multi-level escalation actions. (2) Monitoring tab showing at-risk and breached orders with stats. (3) Escalation History tab. (4) Workflow action 'apply_sla_policy' replaces 'auto_escalate'. (5) Old routes /sla and /escalation redirect to /sla-policies.

sla_policies_crud.list_policies: WORKING - Returns list of active policies
sla_policies_crud.create_policy: WORKING - Creates policy with full config (scope, sla_rules, thresholds, escalation_levels)
sla_policies_crud.get_policy: WORKING - Returns policy with all fields including orders_count

monitoring_endpoints.stats: WORKING - Returns total_active, on_track, at_risk, breached counts
monitoring_endpoints.at_risk_orders: WORKING - Returns orders approaching SLA deadline
monitoring_endpoints.breached_orders: WORKING - Returns orders that exceeded SLA

policy_scope.roles: WORKING - Can select roles in policy scope
policy_scope.teams: WORKING - Can select teams in policy scope
policy_scope.specialties: WORKING - Can select specialties in policy scope
policy_scope.scope_names_populated: WORKING - Role/team/specialty names auto-populated from IDs

workflow_integration.apply_sla_policy_action: WORKING - Workflow action type available with policy_id config field

frontend_ui.three_tabs: WORKING - Policies, Monitoring, Escalation History tabs
frontend_ui.policy_dialog: WORKING - Full policy creation dialog with all fields
